image:image.image:title: Gayathri Dissanayaka — Founder of FuturePlate, School Nutrition Awareness Programme, Sri Lanka
image:image.image:caption: FuturePlate helps adolescents in Anuradhapura, Sri Lanka build lifelong healthy eating habits through education and peer leadership.

image:image.image:title: FuturePlate workshop with students at a government school in Anuradhapura
image:image.image:caption: Students participating in interactive nutrition education sessions at FuturePlate partner schools in Sri Lanka.

image:image.image:title: Gayathri Dissanayaka — Registered Nutritionist & Clinical Dietitian, Founder of FuturePlate
image:image.image:caption: Gayathri Dissanayaka founded FuturePlate to bridge the gap between nutritional knowledge and daily eating habits among Sri Lankan adolescents.

image:image.image:title: FuturePlate nutrition workshop session at a government school
image:image.image:caption: Interactive workshop covering balanced diets, fruit and vegetable consumption and healthy lifestyle habits.

image:image.image:title: Student Nutrition Ambassadors leading a peer education campaign
image:image.image:caption: Selected students trained as Nutrition Ambassadors, running campaigns and assemblies at their schools in Anuradhapura.

image:image.image:title: Healthy cooking session at a FuturePlate school event
image:image.image:caption: Hands-on healthy cooking session encouraging students to increase their daily fruit and vegetable intake.
